name: unreal-plugin-pipeline
description: Configure Unreal Engine plugin release builds for Windows RunUAT packaging.

interface.shortDescription: Build and package Unreal plugins from Codex
interface.longDescription: Windows-first release pipeline for Unreal Engine plugins. It detects local engine installs, writes project-local release tooling, runs BuildPlugin from low to high engine versions, and can launch an automatic Codex release agent with safe full-auto defaults.
defaultPrompt: Set up Unreal plugin release packaging here.
Build this Unreal plugin for all configured UE versions.
